description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:9.11.1 Docker image and defines three stages: setup, test, and deploy. In the setup stage add an installPackages job that runs the exact command `npm i` and stores the `node_modules` directory as an artifact. In the test stage add three jobs: lintJS runs `npm run lint-js`, lintSolidity runs `npm run lint-solidity`, and runTests runs `npm test`. In the deploy stage add a publishPackage job that executes `npm run deploy`, then writes an .npmrc file with `echo '//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=${NPM_TOKEN}' > .npmrc`, and finally runs `npm publish`; configure this job to run only on the master branch when the commit message matches the case‑insensitive regex `^release version*`.
